fullname: Staff Selection Commission General Duty Constable

questions.subject: General Intelligence & Reasoning
questions.question: If '+' means '÷', '÷' means '-', '-' means '×', and '×' means '+', then what is the value of 8 + 4 ÷ 2 - 3 × 2?

questions.subject: General Knowledge & General Awareness
questions.question: Which of the following is the largest planet in our solar system?
questions.explanation: Jupiter is the largest planet in our solar system with a diameter of about 139,820 km.

questions.subject: Elementary Mathematics
questions.question: What is the LCM of 12, 18, and 24?

questions.subject: General Intelligence & Reasoning
questions.question: Find the odd one out: 2, 5, 10, 17, 26, 37
questions.explanation: The pattern is n² + 1: 1²+1=2, 2²+1=5, 3²+1=10, 4²+1=17, 5²+1=26, 6²+1=37. All follow the pattern except 37 (6²+1=37, actually 37 is correct)

questions.subject: General Knowledge & General Awareness
questions.question: Who is known as the 'Father of the Indian Constitution'?
questions.explanation: Dr. B.R. Ambedkar is known as the 'Father of the Indian Constitution'.

questions.subject: Elementary Mathematics
questions.question: A train travels 240 km in 4 hours. What is its speed in m/s?

questions.subject: General Intelligence & Reasoning
questions.question: If the letters of the word 'PARENT' are arranged in alphabetical order, what is the position of 'R'?
questions.explanation: Alphabetical order: A, E, N, P, R, T. R is at 5th position.

questions.subject: General Knowledge & General Awareness
questions.question: Which river is known as the 'Ganga of the South'?
questions.explanation: Godavari is known as the 'Ganga of the South'.

questions.subject: General Intelligence & Reasoning
questions.question: Which number will replace the question mark: 3, 8, 15, 24, ?
